case_title: MORALES, MARIA et al vs. OREJOLA, JOEL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORALES, MARIA POBRE, JASON SANTIAGO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT OREJOLA, JOEL DOES 1 TO 60 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-05-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-06-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-15-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-05-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-05-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-09-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-09-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-09-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, 2ND OSC TO PLAINTIFF OR PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE STATUS CONFERENCE TODAY & ON 12/5/95 AND IF NO GOOD CASE OFFERED FOR FAILURES TO APPEAR, COURT WILL DISMISS CASE. HEARING SET FOR FEB-08-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

attorneys.name: VIGDORCHIK, OLEG A
